Off Calendar Dec-16-2025 Continued To Jan-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Nov-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robin J. Tanabe specially appeared for attorney Wendy Wayne, for administrator Douglas Alston, who was also present (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement.

Ms. Tanabe reported that no objections had been raised with regards to the petition and stated that she believed the settlement remained in the best interest of the estate and her client. The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Ms. Tanabe requested a continuance of the hearing on Status on Close of Estate, set for December 16, 2025. She explained that the estate was in the process of selling the real property, expected to be sold within the month, and intended to file a petition for final distribution thereafter. The Court agreed and continued the hearing on Status on Close of Estate to January 20, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-14-2024 Continued To Jun-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PES_23-306008 The Estate of George R. Alston, and PTR-23-306001 in the Matter of the Elbert S. Alston living trust.

Appearance: Wendy Wayne appearing via zoom for Douglas Alston (Petitioner).
Jeffrey Neustadt appearing in person for Rajarei Sumera (objector).

Mr. Neustadt stated that he withdraws the objections from his client and acknowledges Mr. Alston having higher priority to serve as administrator. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Douglas B. Alston is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Status on close of estate is set for May 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee. The petition to appoint successor trustee is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-18-2023 Continued To May-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Wendy Wayne appeared by zoom for and with Douglas Alston (petitioner) by zoom.
Jeffrey Neustadt appeared by courtcall for Rajarei Sumera.

The court questions why Mr. Neustadt's client has not filed a competing petition. Mr. Neustadt stated that he did not receive notice of the petition, that he had been ill, and that he will file a competing petition. Mrs. Wayne stated that she did not provide notice because Mr. Neustadt's client is not a legal relative, that he is not an heir, and that she did not have any information on his client. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to May 23, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Neustadt is to have his competing petition filed by May 16, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Deputy: G. Tan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-21-2023 Continued To Apr-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
